result.summary: Replaced demo Google Sign-In with Credential Manager API. Added credentials dependencies. GoogleSignInManager now uses CredentialManager.getCredential() with GetGoogleIdOption. Error handling for cancellation, no credentials, Play Services missing. Guest mode preserved.
